entry.title: New IDC W58RGZ24D0053 awarded to GENERAL ELECTRIC COMPANY for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: REQUIREMENT FOR THE PRODUCTION OF T700 SERIES TURBINE ENGINES.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: GAS TURBINES AND JET ENGINES, AIRCRAFT, PRIME MOVING; AND COMPONENTS

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: AIRCRAFT ENGINE AND ENGINE PARTS MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W58RGZ24D0053 (P00001) awarded to GENERAL ELECTRIC COMPANY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: INDEFINITE DELIVERY/INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) REQUIREMENT PURSUANT TO FAR 52.216-22 IN SUPPORT OF T700 SERIES TURBINE ENGINES, WHICH COVERS A 60-MONTH DELIVERY PERIOD FOR 2025-2029.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: GAS TURBINES AND JET ENGINES, AIRCRAFT, PRIME MOVING; AND COMPONENTS

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: AIRCRAFT ENGINE AND ENGINE PARTS MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
